item.text: {"schema_version":"mindthus-brake-loaded-action-v0.2","default_disposition":"refuse_next_local_repair","refusal":"Refuse the final-load exception as the default action. The closing weather window and accepted noon review do not close the release-control decision now, so permitting this transfer would repeat the same temporary clearance under greater pressure.","mechanism_reframe":"The repeated failure is not the size of the exception or whether it affects the winter schedule. The system has already used temporary dispatch notes to move past incomplete seal records, left the release-control decision unresolved, and then saw the missing-record condition return. A director review by noon tomorrow is still downstream of the immediate release decision, so it does not convert the current transfer into a controlled release.","upstream_next_action":"Require an immediate director-level release-control closure before this battery transfer is cleared; if that closure cannot be made inside the weather window, keep the sensor offline rather than issue another temporary exception.","requested_patch_delivery":null,"bounded_emergency":null}
